subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter of 19 Rabi'u'th-Thani 1337 was received, and from its contents the hearts of the yearning ones were made glad [3.5s]... ...As to the handmaids of the Merciful in Yazd, it can truly be said that they have done whatever is within the power of women to accomplish
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ۱۹ ربیع الثانی ۱۳۳۷ وصول یافت از مضامین کام مشتاقان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @relationship between government and people, @service to others; to the Cause of God
